clusters.title: Knicks fans go wild as New York team makes biggest comeback in NBA Finals history
clusters.neutral_headline: Knicks Make Biggest Comeback in NBA Finals History

items.title: Knicks fans go wild as New York team makes biggest comeback in NBA Finals history
items.standfirst: Wednesday's result means the team are now just one win away from a famous Finals win.
items.content: Wednesday's result means the team are now just one win away from a famous Finals win.

items.title: Knicks one win away from NBA title after record comeback against Spurs
items.standfirst: New York Knicks rally to defeat the San Antonio Spurs by a point in a thrilling Game 4 of the NBA finals series.
items.content: New York Knicks rally to defeat the San Antonio Spurs by a point in a thrilling Game 4 of the NBA finals series.

items.title: Knicks rally from 29 points down and beat Spurs for 3-1 NBA Finals lead
items.standfirst: The New York Knicks made a record comeback from 29 points down and moved to the brink of their first championship since 1973 by beating the San Antonio Spurs 107-106 on Wednesday night.
items.content: The New York Knicks made a record comeback from 29 points down and moved to the brink of their first championship since 1973 by beating the San Antonio Spurs 107-106 on Wednesday night.(Image credit: Ross D. Franklin)

items.title: Knicks rally from 29 points down to beat Spurs 107-106
items.standfirst: The Knicks set the record for the biggest NBA Finals comeback Wednesday night as they rallied from 29 points down to beat the Spurs 107-106.
items.content: The Knicks set the record for the biggest NBA Finals comeback Wednesday night as they rallied from 29 points down to beat the Spurs 107-106.

items.title: New York Knicks stage biggest comeback in NBA finals history
items.standfirst: The New York Knicks mounted the largest comeback in NBA Finals history on Wednesday, rallying from 29 points down to edge the San Antonio Spurs 107-106 and move within one win of the championship. OG Anunoby's tip-in with 1.2 seconds remaining sealed the victory, giving New York a 3-1 series lead.
items.content: The New York Knicks mounted the largest comeback in NBA Finals history on Wednesday, rallying from 29 points down to edge the San Antonio Spurs 107-106 and move within one win of the championship. OG Anunoby's tip-in with 1.2 seconds remaining sealed the victory, giving New York a 3-1 series lead.

ai_summary: Knicks rally from 29 points down to beat Spurs 107-106
New York Knicks move to brink of first championship since 1973
OG Anunoby's tip-in seals victory with 1.2 seconds remaining
Knicks set record for biggest NBA Finals comeback
New York takes 3-1 series lead over San Antonio Spurs

clusters.title: Police blast water cannons at protesters amid unrest over stabbing in Belfast
clusters.neutral_headline: Protests Erupt in Belfast After Stabbing

items.title: Police blast water cannons at protesters amid unrest over stabbing in Belfast
items.standfirst: Protesters in Northern Ireland set small fires and hurled bricks and bottles at the police during a second night of violence over a stabbing in Belfast. The incident sparked anti-immigrant violence.
items.content: Protesters in Northern Ireland set small fires and hurled bricks and bottles at the police during a second night of violence over a stabbing in Belfast. The incident sparked anti-immigrant violence.(Image credit: PA)

items.title: Anti-immigrant protesters clash with police, torch car at Belfast rally
items.standfirst: Anti-immigrant demonstrators rallied for another day in Belfast, Northern Ireland, lighting a car on fire.
items.content: Anti-immigrant demonstrators rallied for another day in Belfast, Northern Ireland, lighting a car on fire.

items.title: Belfast protests erupt again after stabbing as police deploy water cannons
items.standfirst: Police have used water cannons on protesters in Northern Ireland after violence erupted for a second night over a stabbing in Belfast.
items.content: Police have used water cannons on protesters in Northern Ireland after violence erupted for a second night over a stabbing in Belfast.

items.title: Protests erupt after brutal knife attack in Northern Ireland
items.standfirst: In Belfast, police are using water cannons to stop rioters and their backlash to a violent knife attack. Some families have been forced to flee as flames ravaged their street. NBC News’ Keir Simmons reports.
items.content: In Belfast, police are using water cannons to stop rioters and their backlash to a violent knife attack. Some families have been forced to flee as flames ravaged their street. NBC News’ Keir Simmons reports.

Anti-immigrant violence sparks unrest in Northern Ireland

clusters.title: Ryanair investigated over charging parents to sit with children

items.title: Ryanair investigated over charging parents to sit with children
items.standfirst: The UK's competition regulator is investigating the airline over charges it imposes on parents to sit next to their child.
items.content: The UK's competition regulator is investigating the airline over charges it imposes on parents to sit next to their child.

items.title: Ryanair investigated over charging parents to sit with their children
items.standfirst: Budget airline describes inquiry as ‘bogus’ as watchdog says it is only large carrier flying from UK to impose chargeBusiness live – latest updatesEurope’s biggest low-cost airline, Ryanair, is facing an investigation over the mandatory fee it charges a parent to sit with their child.The Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) said the Irish carrier’s terms and conditions require at least one parent to sit with their children, including those with disabilities, and bills them about £8 a flight to do so. Continue reading...
items.content: Budget airline describes inquiry as ‘bogus’ as watchdog says it is only large carrier flying from UK to impose chargeBusiness live – latest updatesEurope’s biggest low-cost airline, Ryanair, is facing an investigation over the mandatory fee it charges a parent to sit with their child.The Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) said the Irish carrier’s terms and conditions require at least one parent to sit with their children, including those with disabilities, and bills them about £8 a flight to do so. Continue reading...

ai_summary: UK regulator investigates Ryanair over parent fees
Airline charges parents to sit with their children
Fee is about £8 per flight for parents to sit with kids
Ryanair describes inquiry as bogus
Charge is mandatory for parents with children

items.title: OpenAI says China-based actors stoking opposition to AI data centres
items.standfirst: AI company says ChatGPT accounts sought to 'exploit and amplify existing public concerns' about energy prices.
items.content: AI company says ChatGPT accounts sought to 'exploit and amplify existing public concerns' about energy prices.

items.title: OpenAI Says China-Linked Accounts Aim to Fuel US Data Center Pushback
items.standfirst: OpenAI said a group of ChatGPT accounts with ties to China have sought to stir up local opposition to data centers in the US in a potential bid to hinder the country’s competitiveness in artificial intelligence, echoing recent rhetoric from others in the tech industry.
items.content: OpenAI said a group of ChatGPT accounts with ties to China have sought to stir up local opposition to data centers in the US in a potential bid to hinder the country’s competitiveness in artificial intelligence, echoing recent rhetoric from others in the tech industry.

items.content: Pope Leo XIV says Barcelona's iconic Sagrada Família is a masterpiece of "stones, colours and light" during his visit to Spain.

items.title: Pope Leo blesses Barcelona’s towering architectural masterpiece

items.content: Pope Leo XIV offered his formal blessing to the highest spire of the world’s tallest church, when he holds Mass at the Sagrada Família in Barcelona.
